---
title: "Non-Inferiority Trials"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Non-Inferiority Trials}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
library(ggpower)
```

Non-inferiority tests whether a new treatment is not worse than control by more
than a pre-specified margin $\Delta$.

## Continuous NI

$$H_0: \mu_T - \mu_C \le -\Delta \quad \text{vs} \quad H_1: \mu_T - \mu_C > -\Delta$$

```{r cont}
power_compute("rct_noninferiority_continuous", "a_priori", d = 0.1,
              ni_margin = 0.2, alpha = 0.025, power = 0.8, n1 = 100, n2 = 100)
```

## Binary NI (normal approximation)

```{r binary}
power_compute("rct_noninferiority_binary", "post_hoc", p0 = 0.5, p1 = 0.55,
              ni_margin = 0.1, alpha = 0.025, n1 = 200, n2 = 200)
```

## Related

- [Equivalence (TOST)](pharma-equivalence-tost.html)
- [Formula reference](formula-reference.html)
